name: Credex Auto Title Loans Colonial
description_short: Credex provides auto title loans in Colonial Drive, Orlando, offering $750-$5,000 same-day cash loans secured by vehicle titles with APRs up to 35.95% and 6-24 month repayment terms.
description_long:
Credex Auto Title Loans Colonial has operated for over 20 years, primarily serving Miami-Dade, Broward, and West Palm Beach counties, and now operates a location at 802 E Colonial Drive in Orlando, Florida. The company specializes in auto equity loans (marketed as title loans) designed for borrowers who have been rejected by traditional financial institutions due to poor credit scores or lack of credit history. Their core business model allows customers to borrow against the equity in their vehicles without undergoing traditional credit checks.

Credex offers loan amounts ranging from $750 to $5,000 with a one-time $25 application fee and maximum APRs of 35.95%. Repayment terms are flexible, spanning 6 to 24 months, and the company claims a 98%+ approval rate. The application process is streamlined to three steps: submit proof of residence, income, and national ID; wait for vehicle appraisal and approval; and receive same-day or next-day funding via check. Notably, borrowers retain possession and use of their vehicle throughout the loan term, distinguishing this from traditional title pawning.

Credex differentiates itself through transparent fee disclosure, accessibility features (epilepsy-safe mode, visually impaired mode), explicit anti-scam warnings, and clear regulatory compliance messaging under Florida Consumer Finance Act licensing. The company provides illustrative loan cost examples and emphasizes that approval is based on ability to repay and vehicle condition rather than credit score. Their physical location with posted business hours (Mon-Fri 10am-4:30pm) and multiple contact methods suggest a hybrid in-person and remote lending model.

However, the product carries significant consumer risks. APRs at 33-35% range place these loans near predatory lending thresholds, and the collateralization of vehicles creates repossession risk for payment default. While the website claims transparency, the actual cost of borrowing is substantial—a $4,266 loan over 24 months costs $5,910 total, representing 38% interest cost. These loans are appropriate only for genuine emergencies where no other credit is available, and borrowers should carefully assess repayment ability before pledging vehicle titles.
pros: No credit checks required; approved based on ability to repay and vehicle condition
Same-day or next-day funding via check with simple 3-step application process
Borrowers keep and can drive their vehicle throughout the loan term
Flexible repayment terms from 6 to 24 months to match customer cash flow
Over 98% approval rate for applicants meeting basic requirements
Explicit anti-scam warnings and upfront disclosure of all fees ($25 application fee)
Licensed under Florida Consumer Finance Act with transparency about regulatory compliance
Specific APR caps (maximum 35.95%) and illustrative loan cost examples provided on website
cons: Maximum APR of 35.95% is at the high end of consumer lending, making loans expensive relative to banks or credit unions
Vehicle title is held as collateral, creating repossession risk if payments are missed
Limited service area (primarily Miami-Dade, Broward, West Palm Beach; Orlando location appears newer) may restrict availability
Loan amounts capped at $5,000, insufficient for larger emergency expenses
Only open Monday-Friday 10am-4:30pm with no weekend service hours
best_for: Borrowers with poor or no credit history facing genuine emergencies (medical, vehicle repair, eviction prevention)
Self-employed or gig workers without traditional income documentation who have been rejected by banks
Individuals needing same-day cash who own paid-off or low-lien vehicles
Those seeking short-term bridge loans of $750-$5,000 with reliable repayment ability within 6-24 months
diagnosis: Credex is best for borrowers with poor credit and genuine emergencies who own vehicles and can reliably repay within 6-24 months. The main caveat is that the 33-36% APR range makes these loans expensive compared to traditional credit sources, and vehicle collateralization creates repossession risk—this should only be considered when no other credit is accessible.
services: Auto equity loans (titled as auto title loans) from $750-$5,000
Same-day or next-day cash funding via check
Vehicle appraisal and loan amount determination based on vehicle condition and value
Vehicle title collateral management with borrower retention of driving privileges
Online quotation form submission and remote application support
Free informational resources including FAQ section
In-person loan processing at Colonial Drive Orlando location
Multi-county service area covering Orlando and surrounding zip codes (32806, 32812, 32804, 32801, 32792, 32807, 32789, 32814)
Optional insurance coverage (required for some approvals)
Phone support at 855-527-3339 and email support at service@credex.net
